options.name: --RunMode
options.description:
(Default: DryRun) RunMode is one
of 'TestConfig', 'DryRun' or
'GenerateAlarms'

options.name: --AwsAccessKey
options.description:
The access key to the AWS account
to connect to

options.name: --AwsSecretKey
options.description:
The secret key to the AWS account
to connect to

options.name: --AwsProfile
options.description:
The name of the AWS profile to
use for credentials

options.name: --ConfigFolder
options.description:
Required. The location of the
config files

options.name: --TemplateS3Path
options.description:
Base s3 path for cloudformation
template deployment

options.name: --WriteCloudFormationTemplatesToDirectory
options.description:
Output cloudformation templates
to folder instead of deploying
